rules: Only one feature may be 'active' at a time
State cannot transition to 'passing' without npx tsc --noEmit exiting 0

features.behavior: Homepage renders with video background and team section
Archive page — Canvas tab displays media files from Google Drive
Archive page — Mixes tab fetches tracks from Google Drive and plays audio
Booking page renders with contact email link
Education page renders with program schedule and weekly meeting details
Responsive nav works on mobile with compact dropdown
Archive page — Past Gigs tab fetches event list from Google Sheets
features.verification: npx tsc --noEmit && curl -s http://localhost:3000/archive | grep -q 'Past Gigs'

features.behavior: Team page renders member names from Google Sheets as italic list
